fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` is a disposable class for incrementally constructing <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPath> objects. It provides methods to add lines, arcs, curves, and geometric shapes to a path before converting the accumulated data into a finished `SKPath`.

Use <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot> to obtain a copy of the path so far without resetting the builder, or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> to take ownership of the completed path and reset the builder for reuse. Always dispose the builder when finished.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(10, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 10);
builder.CubicTo(100, 50, 50, 100, 10, 100);
builder.Close();

using var path = builder.Detach();

using var paint = new SKPaint { IsAntialias = true, Style = SKPaintStyle.Stroke };
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides an incremental builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects.
Initializes a new, empty instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" />.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

params.path: The existing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> to initialize the builder with.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> from an existing path.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

params.startAngle: The starting angle, in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle, in degrees, measured clockwise from the start angle.

fields.summary: Adds an arc (a portion of an oval's outline) to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

params.x: The x-coordinate of the center of the circle.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the center of the circle.
params.dir: The direction in which to add the circle contour.

fields.summary: Adds a circle contour to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.direction: The direction in which to add the oval contour.

fields.summary: Adds an oval contour to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.other: The path whose contours are to be appended.
params.mode: The mode controlling how the path is appended.

fields.summary: Appends the contours of another path to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

params.other: The path whose contours are to be appended.

params.mode: The mode controlling how the path is appended.

params.other: The path whose contours are to be appended.

params.dy: The vertical offset to apply to the appended path.
params.mode: The mode controlling how the path is appended.

fields.summary: Appends the contours of another path, translated by an offset, to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

params.points: The array of points forming the polygon vertices.
params.close: true to add a closing line back to the first point; otherwise, false.

fields.summary: Adds a polygon contour through the specified points to the current path.

params.points: A read-only span of points forming the polygon vertices.
params.close: true to add a closing line back to the first point; otherwise, false.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

params.direction: The direction in which to add the rectangle contour.

fields.summary: Adds a rectangle contour to the current path, starting at the specified corner.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

params.direction: The direction in which to add the contour.

params.direction: The direction in which to add the contour.
